reported_entities.name: Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF)
reported_entities.claim: GLEIF's official website; homepage at https://www.gleif.org/en. GLEIF is a supra-national, not-for-profit organization established in 2014 by the Financial Stability Board (FSB) to manage the Global LEI System, overseen by the Regulatory Oversight Committee (ROC).

notes: Salva discovery run (objective=find_companies, industry='financial standards / legal entity identification', keywords include GLEIF) returned retrieval_health=ok but qualified_count=0 -- no entities passed qualification, so Salva did not surface a usable result for this lookup. Fell back to 1 WebSearch query ('GLEIF Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation official website'), which returned https://www.gleif.org as the top result, corroborated by multiple secondary sources (identity.org, LinkedIn, legalidentifier.com) all pointing to gleif.org as canonical.
